陈默的爷爷突然死在了某个秋日的清晨。
人们找不出原因，只在他的书桌上发现了写满拉莱耶语的黄纸。
此后，陈默时常在梦中看到一方名为幻梦境的神秘世界，
这种现象一直持续到他真正踏过九重台阶，进入了幻梦境。
为了调查爷爷的死因，陈默成为了密斯卡托尼克大学的一名调查员，但在第一次参与调查任务时，他却看到了一些不该看到的东西……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocf936d9adaed7cc866b626c07b7ff2f8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"奉命娶菌","author_id":"","book_id":"7411395304655686680","book_name":"旧日开局拿古神一双眼睛不过分吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7411395350746907160","read_count":"920","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1348526"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.3","serial_count":"651","tags":"都市高武,都市,末世,单女主,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5bac825cee433a57721ad5a0961e4e3d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386182&x-signature=1bVn3BMzQO32AIvmFDrplyfOgC8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2515289066980711","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"225"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230156228C0F5902C9550F1C7BA5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39105,"reply_co
